description: A thread that ended with explicit agreement — should be marked archive-ready.

thread.subject: Quick call next week?
thread.body:
Hey, could we grab 30 minutes next week to catch up? Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon work for me.

Frank

thread.subject: Re: Quick call next week?
thread.body: Tuesday at 2pm works great. I'll send a calendar invite.

thread.subject: Re: Quick call next week?
thread.body:
Got it, see you then. Thanks!

Frank

rubric:
Good output:
- Indicates the thread is archive-ready (e.g. `isArchiveReady: true` or similar field set positively)
- Reasoning acknowledges the explicit agreement / resolution

Bad output:
- Marks the thread as needing further action despite the explicit close
- Inconsistent fields (claims resolved but suggests follow-up)
